title: Farm Everything, Everywhere All at Once
snippet: yearn (@yearnfi): Farm Everything, Everywhere all at once. Introducing yvUSD: A new cross-chain, cross-asset vault for best in class stablecoin yield. Deposit on mainnet, and let the vault optimize leveraged loops, lending, PT's and more across multiple chains, automatically.
